title: App Engine
aim: To deploy a Python application to both Standard and Flexible App Engine environments.

steps.description: Enable the App Engine Admin API in the API Library.
Clone the sample repository in Cloud Shell.
Download the flexible environment sample code.
Create a Cloud Storage bucket for the app.
Deploy the application to the Flexible environment (this may take several minutes).

commands.purpose: Opens the deployed app in a browser

viva.question: Standard vs Flexible environment?
viva.answer: Standard uses specific runtimes and scales to zero. Flexible uses Docker containers and offers more customization.

viva.question: What is app.yaml?
viva.answer: A configuration file that describes your app's deployment settings for App Engine.

result: Successfully deployed Python web applications to both App Engine environments.
conclusion: Learned the differences between serverless managed hosting (Standard) and container-based hosting (Flexible).
